goal: Ship `huuma agent --tools explorer`: a baked-in, read-only preset sub-agent (read_file + grep) the parent model can delegate to, built on @huuma/ai@0.0.12's subagent factory. Opt-in via --tools like every other tool, inherits the parent's provider/model, prints one dim status line per delegation. Unknown-name and cli/search config errors keep failing before any interactive prompt.

status_legend.blocked: waiting on a dependency or a user decision
status_legend.done: implemented and verified per the `verify` command

tasks.title: Bump @huuma/ai to ^0.0.12
tasks.summary: Change `jsr:@huuma/ai@^0.0.8` to `jsr:@huuma/ai@^0.0.12` in deno.json, regenerate deno.lock. No agent code changes in this task — it gates everything else. Note 0.0.x caret semantics: ^0.0.8 pins 0.0.8 exactly, so the bump must be explicit.
tasks.verify: deno task check passes and the existing agent tests pass unchanged against 0.0.12.

tasks.title: Two-phase tool construction in src/agent/agent.ts
tasks.summary: resolveTools(names) validates against the union of TOOL_FACTORIES and SUBAGENT_FACTORIES keys, builds eager tools, and returns pending preset names; unknown-name errors list the union. setup() builds presets via resolveSubagents(pending, { model, modelId }) after provider resolution, before constructing the parent agent. agentHelp() lists both registries and gains a one-sentence SUBAGENTS line for explorer.
tasks.verify: deno check src/agent/agent.ts passes; unknown tool name still errors before any provider prompt; --help lists explorer. Behavioural coverage is T4.

tasks.title: Explorer preset in src/agent/subagents.ts
tasks.summary: New module exporting SUBAGENT_FACTORIES with the single `explorer` entry and the SubagentContext type ({ model, modelId }). The factory builds agent({ model, modelId, systemPrompt, tools: [readFile(), grep()], onMessage }) wrapped in subagent({ name: 'explorer', description, agent }). Description instructs the parent to send self-contained prompts and promises concise findings. onMessage filters to role === 'user' and prints one dim delegation line (CLEAR_LINE, dim 'explorer ← <~60-char prompt>', re-write dim 'Thinking...').
tasks.verify: deno check src/agent/subagents.ts passes; module has no import back into agent.ts (agent.ts imports subagents.ts, not vice versa).

tasks.title: Tests for validation, preset construction, and delegation
tasks.summary: Extend agent_test.ts: unknown name throws with explorer in the message; resolveTools(['explorer']) defers the preset without needing a model; mixed lists build eager tools. New subagents_test.ts with a stub model (mirroring @huuma/ai's StubModel pattern): resolveSubagents returns a tool named explorer whose description mentions self-contained prompts; a scripted delegation returns the sub-agent's final text; help output includes explorer.

tasks.title: Docs polish and smoke test
tasks.summary: Add explorer to README's agent section only if it already documents --tools (otherwise --help stays the source of truth). Manual smoke: huuma agent --tools explorer "What does src/mod.ts export?" against a real provider — confirm the dim delegation line and returned findings.
tasks.verify: Smoke run shows one dim delegation line and a correct answer; deno task check/lint/test all green.
